name: Steak a La Stone
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Filet mignon, cut 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat on a cold rack of the broiler pan.
2. Broil at a distance of 3 inches from the heat to achieve the desired doneness, turning once halfway through cooking. Allow 14 to 16 minutes for rare; 18 to 20 minutes for medium.
3. In a large skillet, sauté onions in butter until tender.
4. Add pimento and season with salt and pepper to taste. Cook and stir the mixture for 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Slice the broiled steak into thin pieces and add them to the sauce.
6. Serve immediately with toast points.
